name: create_ticket
description: Create a support ticket in Intercom for structured issue tracking. Tickets differ from conversations in that they follow defined workflows with ticket types, states, and custom attributes. Associate the ticket with one or more contacts and set ticket-type-specific attributes. Tickets support resolution workflows with customizable states (e.g., submitted, in_progress, resolved). Returns the created ticket object.

parameters.name: ticket_type_id
parameters.description: The ID of the ticket type. Ticket types define the workflow, attributes, and states available. Get available types from the ticket types endpoint.

parameters.name: contacts
parameters.description: Array of contact objects to associate with the ticket. Each object must have an 'id' field with the Intercom contact ID. At least one contact is required.

parameters.name: ticket_attributes
parameters.description: Key-value object of ticket-type-specific custom attributes. Available attributes depend on the ticket type configuration (e.g., '_default_title_', '_default_description_', priority, severity).

parameters.name: company_id
parameters.description: The ID of the Intercom company to associate with the ticket.

ticket_attributes._default_description_: Customer reports that the billing settings page at /billing returns a 500 Internal Server Error. Issue started on Feb 28. Customer is on the Pro plan and needs to update their payment method before renewal on March 5.

ticket_type.name: Bug Report
ticket_type.description: Report a bug or technical issue

ticket_attributes._default_description_: Customer reports that the billing settings page at /billing returns a 500 Internal Server Error. Issue started on Feb 28. Customer is on the Pro plan and needs to update their payment method before renewal on March 5.
